004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.commons.lang;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021
022import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
023
024/**
025 * A simple mutable byte value.
026 *
027 * <p>
028 * This class extends {@link Holder}&lt;{@link Byte}&gt; and adds convenience methods for incrementing,
029 * decrementing, and testing byte values, which are useful in lambdas and byte manipulation operations.
030 *
031 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
032 *    <li class='note'>
033 *       This class is <b>not thread-safe</b>. For concurrent access, use synchronization or atomic classes.
034 * </ul>
035 *
036 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
037 * <p class='bjava'>
038 *    <jc>// Create a counter</jc>
039 *    ByteHolder <jv>counter</jv> = ByteHolder.<jsm>create</jsm>();
040 *
041 *    <jc>// Use in a lambda to count items</jc>
042 *    list.forEach(<jv>x</jv> -&gt; {
043 *       <jk>if</jk> (<jv>x</jv>.isValid()) {
044 *          <jv>counter</jv>.increment();
045 *       }
046 *    });
047 *
048 *    <jsm>log</jsm>(<js>"Count: "</js> + <jv>counter</jv>.get());
049 * </p>
050 *
051 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
052 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauCommonsLang">Lang Package</a>
053 * </ul>
054 */
055@SuppressWarnings({
056   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
057})
058public class ByteHolder extends Holder<Byte> {
059
060   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
061   private static final String ARG_values = "values";
062
063   /**
064    * Creates a new byte value initialized to <c>0</c>.
065    *
066    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
067    * <p class='bjava'>
068    *    ByteHolder <jv>counter</jv> = ByteHolder.<jsm>create</jsm>();
069    *    <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(0, <jv>counter</jv>.get());
070    * </p>
071    *
072    * @return A new byte value.
073    */
074   public static ByteHolder create() {
075      return of((byte)0);
076   }
077
078   /**
079    * Creates a new byte value with the specified initial value.
080    *
081    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
082    * <p class='bjava'>
083    *    ByteHolder <jv>value</jv> = ByteHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>((<jk>byte</jk>)42);
084    *    <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(42, <jv>value</jv>.get());
085    * </p>
086    *
087    * @param value The initial value.
088    * @return A new byte value.
089    */
090   public static ByteHolder of(Byte value) {
091      return new ByteHolder(value);
092   }
093
094   /**
095    * Constructor.
096    */
097   public ByteHolder() {
098      super((byte)0);
099   }
100
101   /**
102    * Constructor.
103    *
104    * @param value The initial value.
105    */
106   public ByteHolder(Byte value) {
107      super(value == null ? 0 : value);
108   }
109
110   /**
111    * Adds the specified value to the current value.
112    *
113    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
114    * <p class='bjava'>
115    *    ByteHolder <jv>value</jv> = ByteHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>((<jk>byte</jk>)10);
116    *    <jv>value</jv>.add((<jk>byte</jk>)5);
117    *    <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(15, <jv>value</jv>.get());
118    * </p>
119    *
120    * @param x The value to add.
121    * @return This object.
122    */
123   public ByteHolder add(Byte x) {
124      set((byte)(get() + (x == null ? 0 : x)));
125      return this;
126   }
127
128   /**
129    * Adds the specified value to the current value and returns the new value.
130    *
131    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
132    * <p class='bjava'>
133    *    ByteHolder <jv>value</jv> = ByteHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>((<jk>byte</jk>)10);
134    *    <jk>byte</jk> <jv>result</jv> = <jv>value</jv>.addAndGet((<jk>byte</jk>)5);  <jc>// Returns 15</jc>
135    *    <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(15, <jv>value</jv>.get());
136    * </p>
137    *
138    * @param x The value to add.
139    * @return The new value after addition.
140    */
141   public Byte addAndGet(Byte x) {
142      set((byte)(get() + (x == null ? 0 : x)));
143      return get();
144   }
145
146   /**
147    * Decrements the value by 1.
148    *
149    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
150    * <p class='bjava'>
151    *    ByteHolder <jv>counter</jv> = ByteHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>((<jk>byte</jk>)5);
152    *    <jv>counter</jv>.decrement();
153    *    <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(4, <jv>counter</jv>.get());
154    * </p>
155    *
156    * @return This object.
157    */
158   public ByteHolder decrement() {
159      set((byte)(get() - 1));
160      return this;
161   }
162
163   /**
164    * Decrements the value by 1 and returns the new value.
165    *
166    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
167    * <p class='bjava'>
168    *    ByteHolder <jv>counter</jv> = ByteHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>((<jk>byte</jk>)5);
169    *    <jk>byte</jk> <jv>result</jv> = <jv>counter</jv>.decrementAndGet();  <jc>// Returns 4</jc>
170    *    <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(4, <jv>counter</jv>.get());
171    * </p>
172    *
173    * @return The decremented value.
174    */
175   public Byte decrementAndGet() {
176      set((byte)(get() - 1));
177      return get();
178   }
179
180   /**
181    * Increments the value by 1.
182    *
183    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
184    * <p class='bjava'>
185    *    ByteHolder <jv>counter</jv> = ByteHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>((<jk>byte</jk>)5);
186    *    <jv>counter</jv>.increment();
187    *    <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(6, <jv>counter</jv>.get());
188    * </p>
189    *
190    * @return This object.
191    */
192   public ByteHolder increment() {
193      set((byte)(get() + 1));
194      return this;
195   }
196
197   /**
198    * Increments the value by 1 and returns the new value.
199    *
200    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
201    * <p class='bjava'>
202    *    ByteHolder <jv>counter</jv> = ByteHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>((<jk>byte</jk>)5);
203    *    <jk>byte</jk> <jv>result</jv> = <jv>counter</jv>.incrementAndGet();  <jc>// Returns 6</jc>
204    *    <jsm>assertEquals</jsm>(6, <jv>counter</jv>.get());
205    * </p>
206    *
207    * @return The incremented value.
208    */
209   public Byte incrementAndGet() {
210      set((byte)(get() + 1));
211      return get();
212   }
213
214   /**
215    * Checks if the current value is equal to the specified value.
216    *
217    * <p>
218    * Uses {@link Shorts#eq(Object, Object)} for deep equality comparison, which handles nulls safely.
219    *
220    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
221    * <p class='bjava'>
222    *    ByteHolder <jv>value</jv> = ByteHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>((<jk>byte</jk>)42);
223    *    <jsm>assertTrue</jsm>(<jv>value</jv>.is((<jk>byte</jk>)42));
224    *    <jsm>assertFalse</jsm>(<jv>value</jv>.is((<jk>byte</jk>)43));
225    * </p>
226    *
227    * @param value The value to compare to.
228    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the current value is equal to the specified value.
229    */
230   @Override
231   public boolean is(Byte value) {
232      return eq(get(), value);
233   }
234
235   /**
236    * Checks if the current value matches any of the specified values.
237    *
238    * <p>
239    * Uses {@link Shorts#eq(Object, Object)} for deep equality comparison of each value.
240    *
241    * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
242    * <p class='bjava'>
243    *    ByteHolder <jv>value</jv> = ByteHolder.<jsm>of</jsm>((<jk>byte</jk>)5);
244    *    <jsm>assertTrue</jsm>(<jv>value</jv>.isAny((<jk>byte</jk>)3, (<jk>byte</jk>)5, (<jk>byte</jk>)7));
245    *    <jsm>assertFalse</jsm>(<jv>value</jv>.isAny((<jk>byte</jk>)1, (<jk>byte</jk>)2));
246    * </p>
247    *
248    * @param values The values to compare to.
249    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the current value matches any of the specified values.
250    */
251   public boolean isAny(Byte...values) {
252      assertArgNotNull(ARG_values, values);
253      var current = get();
254      for (var value : values)
255         if (eq(current, value))
256            return true;
257      return false;
258   }
259}
